Template Bank (39)

The full list of email templates across all programs within CTC (10x Launches, Six Figure Emails, Seven Figure Emails, MVL 2.0)

Pre-Launch / Early Access:

Launch-Day:

Sales Emails:

Closing Emails (Final 48 Hours)

Webinar Specific (6):

Downsells (1):

Strategy #1 - The Pre-Launch Early Access

Strategy #2 - The Mid-Cart Temperature Check

Strategy #3 - The “Slice of Life” Closer

Example - Automated Intimacy Beta 2021

Strategy #4 - The Minority-Report Reach Out

Strategy #5 - The Personalized Proposal (Sales Letter)











MVL 2.0 Structure: 



This is the basic recommended funnel format / structure for MVL 2.0. 



If you wish to use it as a starting point -- the full ActiveCampaign automation setup is available in your training portal. 





Day 1 - PL1 - Belief Re-Shift 1 / Consent (Triggers 1A) - Strategy 1

Day X - 1A - Early Access w/ expiring code - Strategy 1

Day 2 - PL2 -  Belief Re-Shift 2 / Consent (Triggers 1B) - Strategy 1

Day X - 1B - Early Access w/ expiring code - Strategy 1



Day 3 - Launch - Official Open Cart (The Aladdin, The Anti-Launch Launch) 

Day 4 - Sales 1  

Day 5 - Sales 2 - Upgraded FAQ

Day 5 - Mid-Cart Temp Check -  Strategy 2



Day 5-7: Minority-Report Reach Outs - Strategy 4

Day 6 - Close 1 (PFYI or The User Agreement) 

Day 7 - Close 2 

Day 7 - Close 3

Day 7 - Close 4 (The Slice-of-Life Close) - Strategy 3



* Option for Sales Page to be via Invitation/Request - Strategy 5



Template Bank (39) 

The full list of email templates across all programs within CTC (10x Launches, Six Figure Emails, Seven Figure Emails, MVL 2.0) 

Pre-Launch / Early Access:

The Bieber (10x Launches - Module 3) 

The Exclusively Empowered Call-Out (10x Launches - Module 3) 

The Way-Too-Early Ultimatum (10x Launches - Module 3) 

Slaughterhouse (10x Launches - Module 4) 

The Calm Before (10x Launches - Module 5) 

The Simon Cowell Qualifier (7FE-2) 

The “And Justice for All” (7FE-3)

Launch-Day:

The Aladdin (10x Launches - Module 5) 

The Anti-Launch Launch (10x Launches - Module 5) 

Sales Emails:

The Upgraded FAQ (10x Launches - Module 6) 

The Curious Case (10x Launches - Module 6) 

The Point-of-no-Return (10x Launches - Module 6) 

The Blind Eye (10x Launches - Module 6) 

Market’s Search For Meaning (6FE - 1) 

The User Agreement (7FE-1) 

The Non-Problem Problem (7FE-4) 

Couples’s Therapy (7FE-6)

The Sarcastic Sally (7FE-7) 

The Mid-Cart Temp Check (MVL 2.0) 



Closing Emails (Final 48 Hours) 

The Perfect For You If (10x Launches - Module 7) 

The 7-Digit Doubt Destroyer (10x Launches - Module 7) 

The Psycho Cybernetic (10x Launches - Module 7) 

The Danny Tanner (10x Launches - Module 7) 

The Co-Creative Close (10x Launches - Module 7) 

The Piglet (10x Launches - Bonus)

The Captain Obvious Close (10x Launches - Bonus)

The Time Compressor (6FE - 3)

The Spoiler Alert (6FE - 4)

The Anthropomorphic Activator (6FE-6)

The Moves Like Jagger (7FE - Bonus)

The Slice-of-Life Close (MVL2.0) 

Webinar Specific (6):

3-Part Webinar “Show-Up” Sequence (10x Launches - Bonus)

3-Segment Post-Webinar Replay (7FE - 5)

Downsells (1):

The DMV Downsell (6FE - 5)













Strategy #1 - The Pre-Launch Early Access 



Strategy: Get consent/buy-in on participation inside the launch. If they chose the ‘YES”, I’m excited to tune in / learn more about the opp -- redirect to either: 



An early-access sales page

An interstitial page (with a video) explaining the perks of early access

A confirmation page that tells them to check their email for a surprise invite (that directs to the sales page) 



Example 1: Copy School Black Friday 2020



Subject: 



read now (before sh*t gets real) 

overheard on some shady-ass marketer’s slack channel 

we’re skipping Black Friday (and doing something even more awesome)

Cancelled Event: Black Friday stupidity. 



Body:



Overheard on just-about-every marketer’s slack channel:



Marketer A: “Hey, so, umm… Black Friday is coming up. What should we do?”



Marketer B: “I dunno. Let’s just take some random piece of content lodged in Module 4 of that program that no one even got results in, and hype the living helsinki out of it. 







With all due respect to Finland… and his holiness N.D.T…



We absolutely will not be doing this.



Nah. 



We’re disembarking the hype train… 



And taking a SpaceX shuttle straight to the planet of “omfg, are Jo & co actually doing this!?”.



Doing what you ask?



Copy School. Aka…



… 10x Facebook Ads (actively selling for: $997) 

… 10x Landing Pages (actively selling for: $997) 

… 10x Emails (actively selling for: $997)  

… 10x Sales Pages (actively selling for: $1,997)  

… 10x Web Copy (actively selling for: $1,997) 

… 10x Launches (actively selling for: $997)  

… 10x Funnels (actively selling for: $997)  



Close to 9k of “yea, folks are actually paying that right now” value.



Plus some pretty epic surprises… 



All for less than a weekly case of Heineken.



In short, we’re not gonna waste your precious time / energy / attention on some suboptimal deal that you snag and forget about by the time Michael Buble’s Christmas album croons from the depths of your living room Sonos.



Instead, we’re gonna give you…



1. the best of what we got

2. at the best price ever



And make you feel damn good about securing a training package that you’ll reference literally every time you open a fresh g-doc to write that ad… or sales sequence… or sales page… that in no uncertain language will declare what you will or won’t get to whiskey clink to on your next team Zoom call.  



(and let’s face it, with all that Zoom fatigue, the last thing anyone needs is a post mortem on a campaign that was essentially dead-on-arrival the moment you chose to write it based off of hunches, assumptions and prayers that quite frankly shoulda been reserved for something else). 



If you want to be shoulder-tapped the second this Copy School package becomes available…



Click here to let me know 



On the other hand, if you’d prefer to save your attention (and black friday dolluh’s) for the product equivalent of Sharknado IV plucked out of a Wal-Mart discount DVD bin…



Let me know here and I’ll make sure to put you on the “do not disturb” list as we release literally our best offer ever. No, it’s ok. Really. Tune it out. It’s fine. 



Lovingly,



~jo :) 





Example 1B - Triggered by Email 2 link click (blue) 



Subject:

dracarys

psst. here’s your secret link to beat the black friday rush



Pre-Header:

your secret link to get Copy School immediately



Automation Rules:

end immediately to those who clicked the blue link above. 



Body:



Jo here.



Stoked that you’re interested in grabbing the most badass Copy School offer ever.



But here’s the thing…



You prob got better things to do tomorrow than wait for me to slack my developer, Steven, with the message “dracarys” which is really my unapologetically nerdy way of saying “push it live”.







So to honor your time (which is prob super valuable if you’re interested in an ROI-rich program like Copy School)...



I’m gonna hook you up with a pre-sale link over here.



Don’t share it.



Or do… if it’ll make you look like a modern day Jon Snow in the eyes of a fellow marketer, founder or copywriter.  



Either way, if you wanna wrap up your enrollment right now and wake up tomorrow with an extra frothy oat milk latte and 7 professional grade conversion programs at your fingertips….



You can subscribe to Copy School here at its most affordable monthly rate ever



~jo :) 



Example 2 - CTC Platinum Affiliate Launch



Subject:

a robot wrote this

TEST: a robot wrote this

what I think about A/I copy bots… 



Body:



Everyone’s freaking out about this whole “AI copy bot craze”.



Which is just weird to me. 



Like… how is this even a conversation? 



Unless you…



… still consider copywriting to be a list of formulaic “power words” 

… have zero respect for your audience’s intelligence or sophistication level

… believe that a bot in it’s “still sh*tting itself” infancy can outperform a fully-matured human



It’s not even a relevant question.



Pinning a bot against a well-trained copywriter sounds more like an awkward carnival side-show than a legitimate showdown. 



Kinda like in the UFC’s early days when they’d pin black belts against boxers for the sheer hilarity of it all. 







Much like those early UFC days, it’s simply a different game. 



A different discipline.



Apples vs Lab-Engineered Soy Burgers. 



Because here’s the thing… 



Copywriting has evolved way beyond “being able to write words that persuade”



It’s become the multi-layered art and skill of…



… building deep and resonant relationships with audiences

… segmenting that audience into relevant conversion experiences

… refining and optimizing offers based on response

… attuning to market sophistication and levels of awareness

… mapping the entire transformational journey between Point A and Point Buyer

… understanding the belief shifts and identity shifts that must take place along the way

… unpacking how placeholder terms like “pain” and “desire” actually show up in their lives. 

… creating safety, courage and resourcefulness in moving forward



For better or worse, you’ll never be able to populate a bunch of stuff into a box called “your audience’s deepest fears” and have a machine spit out anything more than placeholder.



AI Copy Bot vs. Copywriter  is only a valid battle in non relationship-driven businesses.



Maybe they can square off in a product description for a door hinge.



Or the label ingredients on a jar of organic, pasteur-farmed chipotle. 



Or a supplement that cleanses your gut of soy burger residue. 



But when you try to replace a “copywriter”, what you’re really trying to do is take over a rich, deep, nuanced relationship with ever-changing dynamics. 



Asking a ‘bot” to take over that relationship is no different than asking a bot to parent your kids or connect with your partner. 



This is extra true if you’re a coach, consultant or expert whose business is LITERALLY built on trusted relationships and deep resonance. 



The only coaches and consultants flocking to the bots are those with unchecked copy-PTSD, tricking themselves into thinking they’ll never have to lean beyond their copy fears and claim ownership over such a valuable task. 



Anyway… 



Maybe that’s just my “get off my lawn” moment.



But until Alexa is smart enough to “feel the room”; and hit me with some Miles Davis when I’m feeling “a joyful sprinkle of rain-induced melancholy”...



I got bigger battles to fight.



Sumthin’ tells me you do too.



</sign off in XXXXX’s voice>



PS. If you want to do all the things that human copywriters can do oh-so-well across a launch or funnel (our long-time homie, Ry Schwartz calls them conversion coaches)... 



You may be interested to know that we’ve negotiated a no-brainer deal on Ry’s legendary Coaching The Conversion Platinum Suite.



It includes 4 signature programs…



10x Launches (featuring 25+ proven email templates to help you rock every phase of your launch or funnel in record time). Real-world price: 2k. 



10x Sales Pages (with the 15 point sales-page-in-a-day framework to help you conquer the most anxiety-inducing part of your funnel). Real-world price: 2k



Six Figure Emails (his premium “Johnnie Blue” upgrade pack for quickly carving out sales-generating emails over a single matcha latte). Real-world price: $400. 



Seven Figure Emails (its sequel with 7 more templates pulled from Ry’s highest-grossing launches). Real-world price: $500. 



Over 1,000+ coaches, consultants and course creators have learnt and profited from the frameworks and templates within these 4 programs…



All while tapping into their existing skills as a coach or trainer (rather than shoe-horning themselves into old skool direct response methods that never quite felt right). 



If you want to get priority access to the private deal we’ve locked in for you….



Click here to Join TEAM HUMAN and unlock over 80% OFF “Coaching The Conversion Platinum” once it goes live.

Subject:

Body:



Boom!



Stoked that you’re interested in grabbing the CTC Platinum suite by our longtime copy-homie, Ry Schwartz.

We won’t go lightly into the dark digital night. 



And because time is of the essence against the great copy-bot army…



Figured, you’d be interested in getting a head start in arming yourself with some of the most advanced HUMAN tools, techniques and templates in the copy game.



With that said… 



I’m gonna hook you up right now with this private pre-sale link to CTC Platinum



Don’t share it.



Or do… if you have other human recruits who are primed to profit from high-converting copy on their sales emails and sales pages.  



Either way, if you wanna wrap up your enrollment right now and start profiting from CTC before anyone else even knows the offer is available…



You can enroll in CTC Platinum at over 80% OFF right here.



- Signoff



PS. Use code TEAMHUMAN at checkout to lock-in even more badass savings. 



That code expires once the offer goes live to the rest of the list tomorrow. You’d be wise not to test that theory.



For a far more profitable test, I encourage you to enroll now -- dive into a stack of advanced sales email templates inside Seven Figure Emails (my favorite is The User Agreement)...



Learn the persuasive mechanics behind it in 20 mins flat.



Write it in another 20.



And then fire it off to your list (or social) to see if you can 2-5x your entire investment on a single email send. 



If that sounds like a far more profitable game…



Here’s that enrollment link one last time



Example 3 - Phil Powis Private Client

Subject:

(Action requested) My past courses and training libraries are getting an upgrade … 



Body:



A few weeks ago I asked the readers of xxx to share their stories of how my writings and training have supported them in their life over the years …



I didn’t know what to expect when I put out this request, but hearing these stories of transformation has really impacted me. They’ve inspired me and my team to reimagine what we can offer to help people transform difficulties into a well-lived life.



Stories from amazing humans like ... 



xxx, who has been on her own recovery journey and is now showing up powerfully everyday as a recovery counselor, supporting inpatients to break the chains of addiction to drugs and alcohol.



xxx who shared how she now has greater clarity around what she has to share in the world. She is beginning to build an online presence and put together some learning experiences that will allow her to connect with others and share her knowledge and understanding. These are things that only a few years ago she viewed as unthinkable.



Or xxx, who before joining xxx struggled with sustaining change due to beliefs he held closely about physical injury, and internal struggle. He shared how he is now much more accepting of who he is, no longer feels at war with his body or mind, but can instead experience life peacefully and with gratitude for the ways difficult experiences have shaped who he is.



This is incredible!



< SCREENSHOT>



And the xxx that Josh credits with helping make huge changes in habits like self-care, nutrition, and spiritual practice?



In truth, while this is one of our longest standing programs, it’s been less in the forefront over the past year as we’ve been heavily focused on building out more content and experiences exploring the topics of purpose and impact.



And while I wasn’t surprised that this program is still effective (we’ve put a ton of love into it and it’s built on well tested principles around habit creation) ...



I’ve been contemplating a question …



What would happen if my team and I put a bit more love into optimizing the process with techniques, tools and strategies I’ve picked up since? 



So that’s what we’ll be doing.



It’s been a wild year, launching our xxx Mastermind, navigating holding live events & intensives during COVID, and helping lead my family and loved ones through uncertain times.



But we’re finally ready to create something brand new.



At this time, well over 4,000 students have enrolled in …



… xxx (for creating foundational habits, and on learning the skills of habit change)

… xxx (for training in the uncertainty that gets in the way of your meaningful work.)

… xxx (for creating a life of focus, purpose and mindfulness) 



We also have released numerous e-books and training packages over the years that have helped our students lean further into their transformation around Habits and Purpose.



And now, we are ready to add an expanded library that spans the best of everything we’ve ever created here at xxx across these three core areas: 



xxx (so that you can architect a solid, stable life where you are taking care of yourself, learning to live mindfully, simplifying, and creating good routines. Where you can eat well, get active, and feel good about yourself). In this stage, we focus on creating foundational habits, and on learning the skills of habit change.



xxx - A modern day facelift to the material we’ve been teaching in xxx that also incorporates what we’ve been learning in xxx, our highest level mastermind. These training frameworks routinely get credited with helping our members to recognize habitual patterns of response to situations, look for the root cause, and let go of those that no longer are serving, in order to connect more deeply with others and experience life to the fullest. We’ll be adding new training that is proving to be even MORE powerful… such as the practice of doing without certainty.

xxx - (so that you can start to create a broader impact on the world by turning your purpose into action. You’ll start creating, building, connecting, teaching, coaching and serving. This is where you will experience true meaning, and experience greater levels of fulfillment in your life). In this stage, we deepen into commitment to living our purpose.



We’re calling this new upgraded package: 



xxx



In early 2022; we’ll likely make a big deal about it (more polish, live webinar training, guest blogging, podcast appearances etc.)...



But I thought …



Before we do that, let’s open it up to our xxx readership and existing students first with an incredible deal, while giving immediate access to a collection of all the most potent legacy trainings available from xxx, xxx, xxx, and xxx… and then requesting just a bit of patience as we continue to roll out the upgrades mentioned above. 



So please do me a two-second favor and let me know ...



YES, I’ve been an active member of xxx or xxx for at least the past three months, please let me know the details on how I can receive this awesome new training package on the next page.  





Sounds really great! I’d love to get access to the founders lifetime access deal on this new training platform you are creating (it officially goes live later this week).





I’m not interested in exploring this new offer at this time. Please exclude me from any more emails or conversations about xxx at this time. 





I hope you are having an amazing week, and would greatly appreciate you letting me know where you stand.





with gratitude,



xxx

- xxx



PS. The xxx creates a path for stepping into your life, and living a well-lived life of meaning.



We all get caught up in distractions, consumption, busywork and old habits . We all struggle to make changes in our lives, struggle to create something meaningful for ourselves, and then often relegate ourselves into a life of just getting by, of doubting ourselves, of doing things because we think we should.



You’ll begin to work with these struggles in xxx and receive an invitation to create something different for yourself: a life of meaning. 



What could this well-lived life look like for you?



If you are ready to explore this question ...



You can use code EXPLORE at checkout to unlock your extra savings.

Consider the details on this page, and wrap up enrollment today using EXPLORE.















Example 4 - Phil Powis Private Client (2)



Subject:

What I think about the great resignation …

The truth about your uncertain life ...



Body:

Like me, you might have heard a multitude of stories recently about people quitting their jobs in order to find themselves.

The pandemic has caused people to rethink priorities in life, leading them to the conclusion that they need more meaning and purpose in their work and daily life.

One article I read recently said that as many as 40% of all workers have considered leaving their job this year.

That’s a pretty high number!

There's no right or wrong answer when it comes to whether or not someone should quit their job for personal reasons - only what feels right for each individual person in different circumstances. 

And I'm not here to advocate one way or another.

In fact, even if you aren't considering a career change and find a lot of joy in your work, you are probably on some level still feeling some version of this same experience where you sometimes question "is this all that there is?"

And whatever camp you happen to fall into, I believe that it is very normal to feel shaky about whether you are on the right path with your work - and to question what your life purpose is, or be uncertain about what you should do next.

We all want to...

...know what our driving ambitions should be in life.

...feel that we are more than our 9-5 job.

...experience happiness in our daily routines and with our loved ones.

...feel that we’re on the right path.

Let me let you in on a secret: no one is free from this struggle. 

And your job has nothing to do with it in many cases.

Look at the most successful people you can think of — Elon Musk, Bill Gates, Barack Obama, Taylor Swift.

Do you think they have it all figured out? 

Do you think they have certainty and a feeling of reaching perfection? 

Not a chance. 

There is not one of us alive, not me or anyone else, who ever feels certainty about their purpose or path. If they do, they’re fooling themselves. But if they’re honest, they don’t feel that certainty.

No one ever feels they’ve found the perfect job, the perfect productivity routine, the perfect version of themselves … because it simply doesn’t exist.

Instead, our ideals about ourselves and the reality we inhabit are constantly not being met, and so we stress out.

It builds up.

Because here's the thing ...

It's often our attachment to the way we want things to be, and our clinging to this ideal that causes us the most suffering.

For better or worse, if we can begin to relate differently with this truth, then we also can hold the possibility of shifting our experience towards love for the present moment.

... we can begin to notice the stress of our lack of certainty and from this place make a decision about what we want to do next.

... we can loosen our attachment to having the "perfect plan" and realize that life doesn't have to be one way, and in fact, would be quite boring if we knew exactly what was coming next. 

... we can get curious about what is in front of us, and be open to possibility in each moment as it arises.

This is what is available to us when we create space to reflect, and it can be beautiful.

xxx

p.s. If you would like to deeply explore what it means to live a life with purpose, to have meaning in the work you do, and to structure your life with that purpose in mind ...

You may be interested to know that we’re currently offering a pretty sweet earlybird (and lifetime access deal) on our new “xxx” training suite.

It includes 3 signature programs …

xxx (featuring 12 core video modules to help you deepen into sustainable habits that will support your success for the rest of your life). Real-world price: $300



xxx (with the xxx Method that routinely gets credited with helping our students get rid of patterns that are no longer serving, and to experience life to the fullest). Real-world price $599



xxx - (so that you can start to create a broader impact on the world by turning your purpose into action. You’ll start creating, building, connecting, teaching, coaching and serving). Real-world price: $300



Over 4,000+  passionate and incredible human beings have learned and profited from the frameworks, exercises, challenges, and skill sets that are to be gained within these core 3 programs.



All while tapping into your own being & inner purpose (rather than simply acquiring new information, we encourage our students to commit themselves to practice and experience lasting change for themselves). 



If you want to get priority access to the exclusive early deal we’ve created for you….



Click here to join and unlock over 33% OFF “xxx” once it goes live.

Subject:

Unlocked:Use this code today for extra savings on xxx…



Body:





Yes!



I’m excited that you’re interested in grabbing lifetime access to the xxx package we’re getting ready to roll out.



Future you who has courageously moved through uncertainty and shifted deeper into the joy of serving others thanks you for your inspired action.



And since you are interested in getting a head start in arming yourself with all of the most powerful tools & frameworks I’ve created over the past decade at xxx …



I’m going to provide you with an earlybird pre-sale link to xxx



Don’t share it



Just kidding!



Feel free to shout it from the mountain tops if you know anyone else who should join us and could stand to benefit from creating a well-lived life of meaning.



You can enroll in xxx at over 33% OFF right here



And if “current you” is experiencing any fear around taking a stand for creating a life of purpose and possibility, then I encourage you to sit for a few minutes (3-4 minutes) and simply be with it. Notice the fears that have been arising in you, and see how they affect your body. 



What feelings do they arise in you, physically? Be brave to sit with them.



Try to look at the fear with compassion. Wish for your own happiness. Give yourself some love.



Sit for another minute and see the goodness in yourself, underneath the fear. See how wonderful you are, beneath everything.





This takes practice, but this goodness is always present, but we don’t often look at it. 



See the love, compassion, beauty, good intentions, kindness, that are inside of you all the time.





with gratitude,

xxx



p.s. Use code XXX at checkout to confirm your additional savings.



That code expires once the offer goes live to the rest of the world tomorrow. You’d be wise not to hold out to test it out :) 



For a far greater test of your commitment, I encourage you to enroll now -- dive right into The XXX Manifesto  (you’ll then take a  simple assessment, to see which stage of the XXX Path is right for you.) ...



You’ll be guided to pick one focus at a time, to make your training more effective.



Set up your daily and weekly rituals to help you avoid obstacles and common pitfalls.



And then ask for what you need and get supported.



If that sounds like a far more powerful test of your will…



Here’s that enrollment link one last time



















Strategy #2 - The Mid-Cart Temperature Check



Strategy: At the mid-point of cart open - give your audience a chance to self-check where they’re at (in relation to buying). 



Be clear / accurate in describing what the numerical values should represent. You don't want this to feel exaggerated. The more they trust your assessment, the more they’ll trust your recommended action. 



Example 1 - CTC Platinum Affiliate



Subject Options:

checking in…

plz respond

yo, quick check-in… 



Body:



Hey! 



We’re at the mid-way mark of the deal we put together for you on CTC Platinum -- the ultimate copy program designed specifically for coaches and consultants. 



Since you’ve yet to enroll (or opt-out of it)... 



Just wanted to make sure we’re on the same page?



No use continuing to jam on this opp if you’re not interested in bumping your conversions with better copy. 



With that in mind, can I ask you to take a sec to let me know where you stand on a scale of 1-10…



1-5: Not really interested at this time: 



My launch and funnel copy are already super dialed in, and I have a badass team supporting me in it. Appreciate the offer, but don’t really see much room for optimizations or upgrades at this time. 



I’m cool sitting the rest of this offer out. 



5-7: Sounds cool, but still in “think about it mode”: 



Obviously my biz could benefit from better performing copy across my launches, funnels and social posts. And yea, I’ve seen some of the epic case studies and testimonials from many of the legendary coaches and course creators I’ve long-admired.



Just not entirely sure I’m gonna have time to implement this. 



MIles’ recommendation: 



Jump in, and make FULL use of the 60 day, 2-5x your ROI guarantee. 



We're super chill about it. And I think you’ll find out really fast that this isn’t a “learning game” but an ‘execution game” that can pay off from your very first email send literally within hours of signing up.



If you have any lingering q’s you need to ask before wrapping up your enrollment with confidence, you can kick up a chat with us on the sales page. 



7-10: Heck ya I’m in. This is a no brainer. Thx for the reminder :) 



You have emails to write, sales pages to conquer, and high-converting social posts to rock.  



You don’t need to be convinced of the insane-ROI in doing all of the above faster, with more confidence, and higher conversions… all while tapping into the COACHING PRINCIPLES you’re used to, rather than shoe-horning your writing into old school direct response methods that never quite felt right. 



That’s why you’re stoked to…



Secure an amazing 80%+ discount on the top copywriting suite for coaches and consultants



Wherever you stand, plz take a sec to let me know so that your focus can be locked-in on whatever tasks will yield you the highest, most exciting ROI this week.



-Signoff



Example 2 - Phil Powis Private Client



Subject Options:



checking in …



Body:



Hello friend,



We’re at the mid-way mark of the special founder’s offering we put together for you on xxx — a training platform for stepping fully into your life, and living a well-lived life of meaning.



Since you’ve yet to enroll (or opt-out of it) ... 



Just wanted to make sure we’re still adding value to your inbox with these messages?



I’d prefer not to continue sending you these updates if you’re not interested in building better habits, deepening your purpose, or creating more impact (or if you simply don’t think this is the right opportunity for you).



With that in mind, I’d like to ask you to take a quick second to let me know which you most closely identify with on a scale of 1-10 …





1-5: Not really interested at this time: 



I feel like I am content with the life path I'm on presently, and I already feel supported in the aspects of my growth that I am currently focusing on. Or I simply don’t think this is a good fit for me (for any number of reasons).



I’d like to sit the rest of this offer out and get back to receiving your regular xxx weekly emails please :) 



5-7: Sounds really good, but I’m still in “think about it mode”: 



I agree there’s work to be done, and I know I could benefit personally from making a commitment to my own growth. And I’m impressed by the testimonials, and appreciate receiving your regular content.



I’m just not sure If I have the time to make this a priority right now, or if this opportunity is right for me. 



My recommendation (xxx): 



Jump in headfirst, and make full use of the 60-day, no questions asked guarantee



I’ve already shared that this isn’t about taking on “more information”, but instead about getting into “execution mode” so you can quickly put these training methods to the test, starting right after the first email you’ll receive shortly after sign-up. You’ll then know from direct experience if this is a supportive addition to your personal growth toolkit right away instead of continuing to wonder what it’s all about as you continue to deliberate on the details I’ve been sharing with you for the past few days.



If you have questions you feel you  need to ask before enrolling with confidence, you can chat with my team on the offer page, or simply reply to this email.  



7-10: I’ve been waiting for something like this to come around, and am 100% in for xxx. Thx for the reminder :) 



You  want to become a person who sees challenges in an entirely new way. With a sense of possibility and curiosity rather than dread or resignation.



You trust yourself to move towards the things that call to you while having gratitude for where you are today.



You’re not going to miss the opportunity to take this offer to join us on the path of better habits, deeper purpose, and greater impact.



That’s why you are ready to …



Secure an amazing 75%+ discount on our founder’s lifetime access edition of xxx.



It’s OK to be wherever you find yourself in this decision. My team and I would just love to know where you stand so we can be sure that we’re supporting your focus on whatever work is of the highest importance to you, and that we’re not adding to the noise if you aren’t a “hell yes” to xxx.



with gratitude,



xxx









*note here - some impact delayed until friday due to need for follow ups to emails (did 7.1% friday)







Strategy #3 - The “Slice of Life” Closer

Example - Automated Intimacy Beta 2021



Subject:

(last call) what i’m doing to celebrate the end of this A/I launch…



Body:



As a creator, I’ve done close to 25 launches of my own “stuff”.



But as a consumer, I’ve engaged with well over 10x that number. 



And It’s always alarmed me to see creators who would use these last few hours to line up the champagne, count the Stripe notifications, and salivate over the Tesla Model X order page waiting for them on an open chrome tab.



(sometimes quite literally documenting that on their fb or instagram feeds). 



Kinda makes you ask the question… 



What’s their real conquest? 



Their gaudy launch numbers… or your success?



If it was the latter, then the celebration would be deferred to weeks or months later once YOU, the actual client or partner are actually winning and succeeding through the program. 



So, as we enter the final 3-hour countdown, I’ll offer a reminder: 



Despite the abundance of emails this past week… 



It’s not about our launch.



Never has been. 



It’s about what happens after.



Here’s my very non-Insta-worthy plans over the next 3 hours as we wrap this party up…



I’m gonna read “Goodnight Construction Site” to my son. Multiple times. 

Brew some aged Pu-erh tea (thx for the rec, Matt Brown!) 

Sit out on my porch

Listen to Boho-Chill on Spotify

Be on standby for any last minute q’s (you can reply to this email if you have any) 



And finally… 



Read through the intro posts of our 30+ A/I members; seeing your names, faces and stories -- and offering a prayer of gratitude; and requesting from the powers that be that everyone is served to the fullest... and that Phil and I are equipped to do it.







Cos’ once the launch is done.



The real work begins.



Yes there will be relief. 



Yes there will be a sense of accomplishment.



But the whiskey clinks won’t be between me and Phil. 



They’ll be between you and us.



And there’s no one I’d rather clink with.



Deep love and appreciation,



Ry & Phil



PS. If you’re still interested in joining A/I, here are your two remaining options…



Get started on the payment plan for just $XX and move forward with full trust that you’re covered with the 77-Day Guarantee.



Sched a call with Phil or myself for later this week; and lock-in an extra few day grace period to make the best possible decision on A/I (while still locking in the stellar Founder’s deal).





Strategy #4 - The Minority-Report Reach Out



Goal: Create a lead-scoring rules setup for your launch based on:



Email Opens - 5

Link Clicks - 5

Key Page Visits:

Sales Page - 12

Cart - 20

Email Replies - 7 

Webinar Registration - 10



In the Final 48 hours of your launch, do personalized reach-outs (via Loom, Dubb, DM, personal email, etc.) to high-intent leads, checking-in to see how you can support their decisiveness.



With the lead-scoring rules in place, you can safely assure that those with a high lead score ARE actively-involved in a decision-making process; and that your reach-out will be supportive and welcomed. 



Strategy #5 - The Personalized Proposal (Sales Letter)



Goal: 



When launching to small audiences (or invite-only scenarios), rather than de-escalating intimacy by sending to an “anonymous / static” sales page, maintain intimacy by sending a personalized proposal via G-Doc -- and tagging them in the comments.



The sales letter can be written using the 15 Point Sales-Page-in-a-Day themeplate taught inside 10x Sales Pages Track 2.
